summary: AI Confidence Indicators Testing Complete - All 4 V2 AI features now include confidence indicators with signal (strong/moderate/limited) and evidence-based basis text. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 4/4 features verified with confidence indicators visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Confidence computation uses simple threshold checks (not AI), which is correct for deterministic trust signals
ConfidenceIndicator component correctly handles dark variant for AiProgramInsights panel
All confidence responses include both 'signal' (strong/moderate/limited) and 'basis' (human-readable evidence string)

Signal thresholds are appropriate: suggested-actions (>=8 strong, >=3 moderate), pod-brief (>=6 strong, >=2 moderate), program-insights (>=30 strong, >=10 moderate), event-followups (>=8 notes + >=3 athletes = strong)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Confidence Indicators feature verified. Each of the 4 V2 AI endpoints now returns a 'confidence' object with 'signal' (strong/moderate/limited) and 'basis' (e.g., 'Based on 14 event notes, 5 athletes observed'). Frontend ConfidenceIndicator component displays green dot + 'Strong signal' (or amber/gray for moderate/limited) + basis text. Dark variant used on Program Insights page.

backend_confidence_endpoints: POST /api/ai/suggested-actions - Returns confidence: {signal: 'strong', basis: 'Based on 4 priority alerts, 10 upcoming events...'}
POST /api/ai/pod-brief/athlete_1 - Returns confidence: {signal: 'strong', basis: 'Based on 30 timeline events, 2 interventions, 8 pod actions'}
POST /api/ai/program-insights - Returns confidence: {signal: 'strong', basis: 'Based on 25 athletes, 10 events, 29 recommendations, 23 event notes'}
POST /api/ai/event-followups/event_1 - Returns confidence: {signal: 'strong', basis: 'Based on 14 event notes, 5 athletes observed, 7 schools mentioned'}
Coach scoped confidence works correctly - confidence based on coach's data subset
frontend_confidence_indicators: Mission Control 'What Should I Do Next?' - Green dot + 'Strong signal' + basis text visible at bottom of AI panel
Support Pod 'Generate Pod Brief' - Confidence indicator visible at bottom of pod brief card
Program Intelligence 'Generate Strategic Insights' - Dark variant confidence indicator (white text on dark bg)
Event Summary 'Generate Follow-Up Suggestions' - Confidence indicator visible at bottom of followups panel

confidence_signal_types.strong: Green dot (bg-emerald-500), indicates high data confidence
confidence_signal_types.moderate: Amber dot (bg-amber-500), indicates moderate data confidence
confidence_signal_types.limited: Gray dot (bg-gray-400), indicates limited data available

confidence_threshold_logic.suggested-actions: total_signals (alerts + events + attention + recs) >= 8 = strong, >= 3 = moderate
confidence_threshold_logic.program-insights: total (athletes + events + recs + notes) >= 30 = strong, >= 10 = moderate
confidence_threshold_logic.event-followups: notes >= 8 AND unique_athletes >= 3 = strong, notes >= 3 = moderate
